name: Martand Sun Temple
description: The majestic, colossal ruins of a massive 8th-century Hindu temple dedicated to Surya (the Sun God). It offers a breathtaking example of ancient Kashmiri temple architecture.
history: Built by the powerful King Lalitaditya Muktapida of the Karkota dynasty. It was tragically destroyed by Sikandar Shah Miri in the 15th century.
famousFor: Massive stone architecture, historical ruins, Bollywood filming (Haider).
